findings.detail: Clean left-to-right row of 3 cells for ["apple","banana","cherry"]. Each cell shows the value (bold) plus its positive/negative index pair (0/-3, 1/-2, 2/-1), correctly conveying that index 0 and -n point at the same element per corpus 5.2. Labels legible, no overlap or truncation, index-pair subtitles readable at viewer scale, uniform blue color tier is sane for an index map. LR linearity is intended for a spatial index map (not flagged as linear_flow_branched).
